nodes.title: NOTE
widgets_values:
## You need to use an edit LoRA, otherwise it won't work. Here are the links, just pick one.

---
#1. <https://civitai.red/models/2652469/animaedit-experimental?modelVersionId=2978373>

#2. <https://civitai.red/models/2650553/anima-edit-nude-filter-clothes-change-more?modelVersionId=2976234>

#3. <https://civitai.red/models/2587631/nude-filter-or-simple-edit>

nodes.title: Notes for anyone planning to train a LoRA
widgets_values:
Please read the description from this link 
[<https://civitai.red/models/2587631/nude-filter-or-simple-edit>], 
and for dataset preparation, read from this link 
[<https://github.com/Mirumo0u0/sd-scripts/blob/main/docs/anima_conditioning_training.md>].

nodes.title: Note: Prompt format
widgets_values:
Max tokens for this model is only 32, to separately prompt multiple subjects you can separate prompts with comma, and set the max amount of objects detected for each prompt with :N

For example above test prompt finds 2 cakes, one apron, 4 window panels

```
eye:2, window panels:4
```

face closeup
